# shadcn-google-maps

> Google Places autocomplete for shadcn/ui using the Places API (New) — AutocompleteSuggestion, session tokens, and PlacePrediction.toPlace().

## Overview

shadcn-google-maps provides a copy-paste / CLI-installable `PlacesAutocomplete` component for Next.js apps. It loads the Maps JavaScript API with the `places` library, debounces user input, fetches suggestions via `AutocompleteSuggestion.fetchAutocompleteSuggestions`, and resolves a full place with `fetchFields` on selection.

This uses the modern Places API (New), not legacy `AutocompleteService.getPlacePredictions` or the `google.maps.places.Autocomplete` widget.

## Installation

### shadcn CLI

```bash
bunx shadcn@latest add https://shadcn-google-maps.vercel.app/r/places-autocomplete.json
```

### Manual

Copy from:
https://github.com/gurbaaz27/shadcn-google-maps/tree/main/registry/new-york/places-autocomplete

### Dependencies

- `@types/google.maps` (TypeScript)
- shadcn `input` and `button` components
- `lucide-react`
- Next.js `next/script` (included with Next.js)

## Environment

```env
NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=your_key_here
```

Enable in Google Cloud Console:
- Maps JavaScript API
- Places API (New)

Restrict the API key with HTTP referrers for your production and localhost origins.

## Component API

### PlacesAutocomplete props

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| value | string | Controlled input value |
| defaultValue | string | Uncontrolled initial value |
| onValueChange | (value: string) => void | Input text changes |
| onPlaceSelect | (place: SelectedPlace) => void | Required. Fired when user picks a suggestion |
| apiKey | string | Overrides NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY |
| countryCode | string \| null | ISO region code for includedRegionCodes |
| debounceMs | number | Default 300 |
| placeholder | string | Input placeholder |
| disabled | boolean | Disables input |
| className | string | Wrapper class |
| inputClassName | string | Input class |
| showPoweredByGoogle | boolean | Default true (attribution) |

### SelectedPlace

```typescript
type SelectedPlace = {
  address: string
  lat: number | null
  lng: number | null
  placeId: string | null
}
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { PlacesAutocomplete } from "@/components/ui/places-autocomplete"

<PlacesAutocomplete
  countryCode="us"
  onPlaceSelect={(place) => {
    console.log(place.address, place.lat, place.lng)
  }}
/>
```

## Registry

Built JSON: https://shadcn-google-maps.vercel.app/r/places-autocomplete.json

Rebuild locally: `bun run registry:build`
